subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1911-08-27 in Thonon-les-Bains
subcodes.first_line: O ye who are present! How long this drowsiness and sleep! How long this ignorance and blindness!
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الحاضرون الی متی هذا الهجوع و السبات و الی متی هذا الرجوع القهقری و الی
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @oneness; unity of religion, @unity; oneness of humanity, @Muhammad; Islam, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @Christ; Christianity, @call to action, @Moses, @prophecy and fulfillment
